---
title: "PBMC 3k scRNA-seq Analysis"
author: "Single-Cell Course — Live Demo"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    self_contained: true
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5
)
```

# Setup

```{r load-libraries}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
```

# 1. Load Data

```{r load-data}
pbmc.data <- Read10X(data.dir = "data/pbmc3k/filtered_gene_bc_matrices/hg19/")
pbmc <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = pbmc.data, project = "pbmc3k",
                           min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)
pbmc
```

# 2. Quality Control

```{r qc-metrics}
pbmc[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(pbmc, pattern = "^MT-")
```

```{r qc-violin, fig.height=6}
VlnPlot(pbmc, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), ncol = 3)
```

```{r qc-scatter}
plot1 <- FeatureScatter(pbmc, feature1 = "nCount_RNA", feature2 = "percent.mt")
plot2 <- FeatureScatter(pbmc, feature1 = "nCount_RNA", feature2 = "nFeature_RNA")
plot1 + plot2
```

```{r qc-filter}
pbmc <- subset(pbmc, subset = nFeature_RNA > 200 & nFeature_RNA < 2500 & percent.mt < 5)
pbmc
```

# 3. Normalization & Variable Features

```{r normalize}
pbmc <- NormalizeData(pbmc, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
```

```{r variable-features}
pbmc <- FindVariableFeatures(pbmc, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)

top10 <- head(VariableFeatures(pbmc), 10)
plot1 <- VariableFeaturePlot(pbmc)
plot2 <- LabelPoints(plot = plot1, points = top10, repel = TRUE)
plot2
```

# 4. Scaling & PCA

```{r scale-pca}
pbmc <- ScaleData(pbmc)
pbmc <- RunPCA(pbmc, features = VariableFeatures(object = pbmc))
```

```{r pca-viz}
DimPlot(pbmc, reduction = "pca") + NoLegend()
```

```{r elbow}
ElbowPlot(pbmc)
```

# 5. Clustering & UMAP

```{r cluster}
pbmc <- FindNeighbors(pbmc, dims = 1:10)
pbmc <- FindClusters(pbmc, resolution = 0.5)
```

```{r umap}
pbmc <- RunUMAP(pbmc, dims = 1:10)
DimPlot(pbmc, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE) + NoLegend()
```

# 6. Find Marker Genes

```{r markers}
pbmc.markers <- FindAllMarkers(pbmc, only.pos = TRUE, min.pct = 0.25,
                               logfc.threshold = 0.25)

top5 <- pbmc.markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(n = 5, order_by = avg_log2FC)

top5
```

```{r heatmap, fig.height=10, fig.width=10}
DoHeatmap(pbmc, features = top5$gene) + NoLegend()
```

# 7. Cell Type Annotation

```{r annotate}
new.cluster.ids <- c(
  "Naive CD4 T",    # 0
  "CD14+ Mono",     # 1
  "Memory CD4 T",   # 2
  "B",              # 3
  "CD8 T",          # 4
  "FCGR3A+ Mono",   # 5
  "NK",             # 6
  "DC",             # 7
  "Platelet"        # 8
)
names(new.cluster.ids) <- levels(pbmc)
pbmc <- RenameIdents(pbmc, new.cluster.ids)
```

```{r umap-annotated, fig.width=9}
DimPlot(pbmc, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, pt.size = 0.5) + NoLegend()
```

# 8. Marker Visualizations

```{r feature-plots, fig.height=10, fig.width=10}
FeaturePlot(pbmc, features = c("MS4A1", "GNLY", "CD3E", "CD14",
                                "FCER1A", "FCGR3A", "LYZ", "PPBP", "CD8A"),
            ncol = 3)
```

```{r dotplot, fig.width=10}
markers <- c("IL7R", "CCR7",          # Naive CD4 T
             "CD14", "LYZ",            # CD14+ Mono
             "IL7R", "S100A4",         # Memory CD4 T
             "MS4A1",                  # B
             "CD8A",                   # CD8 T
             "FCGR3A", "MS4A7",        # FCGR3A+ Mono
             "GNLY", "NKG7",           # NK
             "FCER1A", "CST3",         # DC
             "PPBP")                   # Platelet

DotPlot(pbmc, features = unique(markers)) +
  RotatedAxis()
```

```{r violin-markers, fig.height=8}
VlnPlot(pbmc, features = c("CD3D", "MS4A1", "CD14", "FCGR3A"),
        ncol = 2)
```

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
